revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月廿五]][[zh:正月廿五]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 25|qq=January 25}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 25''' is the 25th day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Engi (era)|en|Engi (era)|qid=Q1374325|lt=Engi|1=Engi (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|901|en|901|qid=Q23580|lt=901|1=901}} {{ill|February 16|en|February 16|qid=Q2342|lt=February 16|1=February 16}}) – {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|qid=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michinane|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} departs from Kyoto en route to Dazaifu. * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|qid=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku|1=Shōryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|990|en|990|qid=Q23730|lt=990|1=990}} {{ill|February 23|en|February 23|qid=Q2352|lt=February 23|1=February 23}}) – The court noble and granddaughter of Fujiwara Kaneyori, known as {{ill|Teishi|ja|定子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原定子|1=Fujiwara no Teishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1190972}}, enters the palace. * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1789|en|1789|qid=Q7772|lt=1789|1=1789}} {{ill|February 19|en|February 19|qid=Q2340|lt=February 19|1=February 19}}) – Owing to disasters, the era name was changed from {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} to {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}}. == Births == * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|March 10|en|March 10|qid=Q2397|lt=March 10|1=March 10}}) – {{ill|Kokichi Mikimoto|en|Kokichi Mikimoto|qid=Q956283|lt=Mikimoto Kōkichi|1=Kokichi Mikimoto}}, the developer of pearl cultivation (died {{ill|1954|en|1954|qid=Q18581|lt=1954|1=1954}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|March 14|en|March 14|qid=Q2404|lt=March 14|1=March 14}}) – {{ill|Tokutomi Sohō|en|Tokutomi Sohō|qid=Q708794|lt=Tokutomi Sohō|1=Tokutomi Sohō}}, a noted critic (died {{ill|1957|en|1957|qid=Q5311|lt=1957|1=1957}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|qid=Q1195433|lt=Kennin|1=Kennin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1201|en|1201|qid=Q5225|lt=1201|1=1201}} {{ill|March 1|en|March 1|qid=Q2393|lt=March 1|1=March 1}}) – {{ill|Princess Shikishi|en|Princess Shikishi|qid=Q735939|lt=Shikishi Naishin|1=Princess Shikishi}}, the third princess of Emperor Go-Shirakawa and a celebrated waka poet (born {{ill|1152|en|1152|qid=Q19645|lt=1152|1=1152}}). * {{ill|Kenryaku|en|Kenryaku|qid=Q1194260|lt=Kenryaku|1=Kenryaku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1212|en|1212|qid=Q5255|lt=1212|1=1212}} {{ill|February 29|en|February 29|qid=Q2364|lt=February 29|1=February 29}}) – {{ill|Hōnen|en|Hōnen|qid=Q507980|lt=Hōnen|1=Hōnen}}, founder of Jōdo-shū Buddhism (born {{ill|1133|en|1133|qid=Q19586|lt=1133|1=1133}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1633|en|1633|qid=Q6870|lt=1633|1=1633}} {{ill|March 5|en|March 5|qid=Q2392|lt=March 5|1=March 5}}) – {{ill|Satake Yoshinobu|ja|佐竹義宣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Yoshinobu|qq=}}, a military commander and Sengoku daimyō (born {{ill|1570|en|1570|qid=Q6659|lt=1570|1=1570}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1613|en|1613|qid=Q6776|lt=1613|1=1613}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – {{ill|Ikeda Terumasa|en|Ikeda Terumasa|qid=Q1385927|lt=Ikeda Terumasa|1=Ikeda Terumasa}}, a daimyō (born {{ill|1564|en|1564|qid=Q6632|lt=1564|1=1564}}). * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1701|en|1701|qid=Q6814|lt=1701|1=1701}} {{ill|March 4|en|March 4|qid=Q2396|lt=March 4|1=March 4}}) – {{ill|Keichū|en|Keichū|qid=Q1334965|lt=Keichō|1=Keichū}}, a Kokugaku scholar (born {{ill|1640|en|1640|qid=Q6901|lt=1640|1=1640}}). * {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|qid=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa|1=Kyōwa}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1802|en|1802|qid=Q6883|lt=1802|1=1802}} {{ill|February 27|en|February 27|qid=Q2361|lt=February 27|1=February 27}}) – {{ill|Kimura Kenkadō|en|Kimura Kenkadō|qid=Q3490716|lt=Kimura Kanbōdō|1=Kimura Kenkadō}}, a literary painter (born {{ill|1736|en|1736|qid=Q6989|lt=1736|1=1736}}).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Shōgatsu|Shōgatsu]] (New Year’s Day observances)
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|24|1|26|12|25|2|1|0125|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|1月25日 (旧暦)|version=98119351|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:1 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]]
[[ko:음력 1월 25일]] [[ja:1月25日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月廿五]]
[[ar:January 25 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月廿五]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月廿五]] {{wikidata link|Q839249}} [[Category:Days 25 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
